pvs.author: Wordhuntering
pvs.description:
Original Video~ http://www.nicovideo.jp/watch/sm14332782
Translation~ http://www.animelyrics.com/doujin/vocaloid/babylon.htm

バビロン (Babylon)
Music, lyrics, illust: Tohma
Vocal: Hastune Miku

Since Tohma's lyrics can be vague and vary depending on the translater, I recommend also checking out this translation made by Hazuki no Yume here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Bfzeqw_sShQ
I also recommend subscribing to their youtube channel here: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCYfqOkiuHA1ElyZx7ZvKNMg
pvs.name: Babylon {English Sub}~ Hatsune Miku
